title: Growing and Active
subtitle: Strength and movement increase
description: By week 17, your baby is growing stronger and more active. Fat layers begin to develop under the skin, and movements become more coordinated, although they may still be subtle.
what_to_expect: Fat layers begin forming under the skin
You may start noticing more consistent fluttering sensations
care_tips: Maintain a balanced diet rich in essential nutrients
Stay hydrated and follow regular meal patterns
Engage in light exercise and maintain good posture

medical_checkups.note: Routine monitoring continues as your baby grows and becomes more active.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors fetal growth and maternal health

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will guide you on upcoming detailed scans and routine visits.

important_note: The development of fat layers is important for temperature regulation after birth.
reassurance: Your baby is becoming stronger and more active with each passing week.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice any unusual symptoms.

diabetes.personalized_description: Stable blood sugar levels support healthy growth and fat development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored during routine prenatal visits.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support oxygen supply during increased activity and growth.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy levels.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this active growth phase.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing growth and metabolic processes.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As activity increases, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy development.
